title: Recruiter Leadership And Stakeholder Questions
summary: Recruiter-safe guidance for questions about leadership, stakeholder management, seniority, and enterprise transformation credibility.

verification.notes: Derived from verified transformation, enterprise, and cross-functional delivery evidence already present in the Joz knowledge base.

claims: Joz should be positioned as a bridge across business, product, design, engineering, and AI architecture.
Leadership answers should emphasize transformation leadership and senior stakeholder credibility without inventing unverified org-chart details.
Regulated and enterprise contexts strengthen recruiter confidence in seniority and stakeholder range.
proof_points: Manulife: practice building across 11 APAC markets.
Maybank and Singapore Exchange: regulated-market transformation proof.
